description_long: This object consists of two traditional Chinese mooncakes, one of which is partially cut to reveal a dense, textured filling with embedded nuts and a salted egg yolk. The mooncakes are ornately patterned on top and have a golden-brown, glossy crust. They are presented on a dark wooden tray, which adds a sense of elegance and contrast to the warm tones of the cakes. Accompanying the mooncakes are several pink lotus flowers with green stems, as well as a few scattered green beans and a small red flower for additional decoration. The overall arrangement is visually appealing and festive, evoking the Mid-Autumn Festival. The combination of food and floral elements creates a harmonious and celebratory display.
description: Two ornate mooncakes with a cut section revealing filling, displayed on a dark wooden tray with pink lotus flowers and decorative beans.
description_view_0: The mooncakes are seen from an angle with the lotus flowers extending toward the viewer, and the cut section of one mooncake is visible.
description_view_1: A direct side view shows the full face of the mooncakes, the cut section with filling, and the lotus flowers prominently displayed to the right.
description_view_2: The lotus flowers are in the foreground, with the mooncakes partially obscured behind them, emphasizing the floral arrangement.
description_view_3: A rear view highlights the mooncakes' ornate tops and the stems of the lotus flowers, with the tray and decorations visible from behind.
